title: MorisMos Navy Whale Teddy Soft Toy with Babies inside, Lifelike Sea Whales Stuffed Animal Plush Cuddly, Kawaii Presents for Kids Girls Boys Birthday Party Decorations (50 cm)

description: Product Description MorisMos Navy Whale Teddy Soft Toy with Babies inside, Lifelike Sea Whales Stuffed Animal Plush Cuddly Four Whale Stuffed Animals: Stuffed whale plush with three removable babies; easy to store and carry with zip on mum's tummy; Ideal for children's interactive play; great addition to stuffed whale collection Fun and Educational: Realistic stuffed animal set lets your child's imagination play and have fun; perfect for adventure or pretend play, parent-child bonding, and encouraging interests Huggable Whales: Softest material for snuggling up and sleeping on a cloud; soft and cuddly bedtime companions; decorate the room; a huggable pillow to help you relax Thoughtful Present: Lifelike whale family set with a surprise in its tummy; perfect for a variety of occasions, including birthdays, holidays, Christmas, Halloween, Easter, Children's Day, and party decorations; excellent playtime companions Adopt a Whale Family: Open your vacuum-sealed package and watch your whale plushie come to life in just 30 minutes! All you have to do is pat it. We're always here for you!
